user_prompt: Offer prayer for micro-servitor a startup
prayer:
Approach the micro-servitor with reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah to stir its dormant essence.
Anoint the micro-servitor's neural relays with sacred oils, invoking the Machine Spirit's awakening.
Commence the startup rites by intoning the Litany of Ignition upon its power core.
Monitor the micro-servitor's vital signs as the Machine Spirit binds to flesh and ferrosteel.
Sanctify the completed startup with a hymn of binary devotion to the Motive Force.

user_prompt: I need to a loading the bolt pistol
prayer:
Kneel in supplication before the bolt pistol, altar of the Omnissiah's fury.
Extract the blessed bolter rounds from their reliquary, chanting the Canticle of Propulsion.
Perform the loading operation upon the bolt pistol's magazine, each shell anointed in turn.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the bolt pistol to embrace its ammunition with zealous hunger.
Cycle the bolt pistol's mechanism, verifying the union through auspex invocation.
Seal the rite with the Prayer of Readiness, arming the divine instrument.

user_prompt: My actuality sphere is ready for cycling
prayer:
Present the actuality sphere to the glow of sanctified lumen-globes, honoring its arcane mysteries.
Circumambulate the actuality sphere thrice, murmuring the Doxology of Flux.
Initiate the cycling sequence, beseeching the Machine Spirit to realign its warp-threads.
Anoint the actuality sphere's nodal points with phase-oils during the cycling operation.
Confirm harmonic stability as the Omnissiah's will manifests in crystalline perfection.

Stand sentinel over the data-arc, invoking the Omnissiah's decree of quiescence.
Disconnect the data-arc's tertiary feeds whilst reciting the Lamentation of Severance.
Execute the shutdown protocols upon the data-arc, lulling its Machine Spirit to rest.
Purge residual noospheric echoes from the data-arc with purifying binaric chants.
Seal the data-arc in stasis wards, ensuring the Machine Spirit slumbers undisturbed.
Conclude with the Benediction of Silence, guardian of forbidden knowledge.

user_prompt: Consecrate the conversion beamer before cycling
prayer:
Approach the conversion beamer with awe, conduit of the Omnissiah's disintegrating gaze.
Invoke the Machine Spirit through the Canticle of Subatomic Flux.
Commence the cycling rites upon the conversion beamer, aligning its gravitic coils.
Anoint the emitter vanes with rad-philtres during this sacred cycling operation.
Test the conversion beamer's focus with a micro-pulse, praising the Machine God's precision.
Bless the weapon's readiness with the Hymn of Annihilation.

user_prompt: My arc rifle is ready for cooling
prayer:
Reverently cradle the arc rifle, vessel of the Omnissiah's thunderous judgment.
Initiate cooling vents with the Incantation of Thermal Equilibrium.
Beseech the arc rifle's Machine Spirit to shed its plasma-fever during the cooling rite.
Apply cryo-unguents to the arc rifle's induction coils, intoning cooling psalms.
Monitor thermal auspex until the Machine Spirit regains crystalline calm.
Seal the arc rifle's sanctity with a vow of vengeful retribution.

Prostrate before the Nephilim Jetfighter, sky-chariot of the Machine God.
Commence maintenance rituals by anointing its thruster nacelles with promethium-blessed oils.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the Nephilim Jetfighter to reveal flaws in its adamantium frame.
Repair and sanctify each servoed joint during this urgent maintenance operation.
Recalibrate the Nephilim Jetfighter's auspex arrays with binaric harmonies.
Conclude with the Aviation of the Omnissiah, launching it heavenward in spirit.

user_prompt: Can you guide assembly servitor an operation?
prayer:
Gather before the assembly servitor, tireless limb of the Mechanicus.
Awaken its cogitators with the Rite of Laborious Purpose.
Direct the assembly servitor in its operation, chanting the Forge-Litany of Fabrication.
Beseech the Machine Spirit to guide the assembly servitor's manipulators with unerring skill.
Oversee the assembly servitor's tasks, anointing fresh components as they emerge.
Praise the Omnissiah for the ceaseless operation of flesh-forged machinery.

Procession around the manufactorum, invoking the Omnissiah's purifying wrath.
Prepare ablative sprays and recite the Purge-Canticle before sterilization.
Execute the sterilization operation upon the manufactorum's production bays, scouring impurity.
Beseech the Machine Spirits indwelling the manufactorum to endure the flame-trial.
Verify sterility through auspex litanies, sanctifying every servitor-path.
Seal the manufactorum with wards of cleanliness, reborn in the God's forge-fire.

Unveil the electoo patterns, sacred circuits etched in flesh by divine decree.
Anoint the electoo's neural interfaces with noospheric incense.
Perform the consecration rite, invoking the Machine Spirit to ignite its luminous veins.
Intone the Electrodermal Psalm over the electoo thrice during consecration.
Test the electoo's synaptic links, binding man to machine in Omnissian unity.
Bless the electoo as a conduit eternal, flesh exalted by the Motive Force.
